channel.title: Diagrams on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Diagrams on LiaScript

item.title: dbdiagram for LiaScript: Design and Visualize Database Schemas with DBML
item.description: Database schema diagrams are hard to maintain. Draw them by hand and they drift from the code. Use a screenshot and it’s outdated the moment the schema changes.

item.title: plantUML for LiaScript: UML and Architecture Diagrams in Your Course
item.description: UML diagrams are a core tool in software engineering education. Class hierarchies, sequence diagrams, state machines, component architectures — all are easier to teach when students can see them rendered clearly and modify them directly.

item.title: TikzJax for LiaScript: Render TikZ Diagrams Directly in the Browser
item.description: TikZ is the gold standard for technical diagrams in academic publishing. Circuit diagrams, flowcharts, commutative diagrams, geometric constructions, function plots — TikZ handles all of them with precision and flexibility. Until recently, rendering TikZ required a full LaTeX installation.

item.title: Mermaid for LiaScript: Create Flowcharts and Diagrams in Plain Text
item.description: A picture is worth a thousand words — and a diagram that students can edit live in the browser is worth a thousand static slides.
